categories.name: Bag Charms
categories.tagline: Clip-on charms for totes, backpacks & everyday bags.

products.name: Cherry Blossom Bag Charm
products.shortDescription: Soft pink beads with a little brass bell.
products.description: A dainty cluster of pink glass beads finished with a tiny brass bell and a sturdy clip that won't scratch your bag's hardware. Clips on and off in seconds.

reviews.name: Ayesha R.
reviews.text: So much prettier in person, and it survived being tossed around in my tote all week.

reviews.name: Meher K.
reviews.text: Lovely little charm, arrived well packed. Would love more colour options.

products.name: Gingham Bow Bag Charm
products.shortDescription: A pink gingham bow with a pearl drop.
products.description: A checked ribbon bow paired with a single freshwater pearl drop, on a gold-tone clip. A quiet, girly little detail for any bag.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: Exactly like the photos, the bow holds its shape really well.

categories.name: Phone Charms
categories.tagline: Sweet little charms for your phone strap or case ring.

products.name: The Wanderer's Key Charm
products.shortDescription: A handcrafted vintage-inspired charm featuring an antique key, butterflies, and warm golden accents—made to add a touch of adventure to your bag, phone, or keys.
products.description: Unlock new journeys wherever you go. Featuring an antique key, delicate butterflies, warm amber-toned beads, tiny stars, and a vintage compass charm, this handcrafted bag charm is designed for dreamers, explorers, and anyone who believes every adventure begins with a single step. Attach it to your handbag, backpack, keys, or phone for a touch of timeless charm.

reviews.name: Divya N.
reviews.text: Cutest little thing, gets compliments every time I take a call.

reviews.name: Rhea M.
reviews.text: Good quality for the price, just wish the loop was slightly bigger.

products.name: Connected Hearts Charm Set
products.shortDescription: A handcrafted matching charm set featuring 'His' and 'Hers' bead loops, connected by a heart to celebrate love, friendship, and the little moments that bring you together.
products.description: Connected Hearts Charm Set is a handcrafted pair of matching phone charms designed for couples, best friends, or anyone who shares a special bond. Featuring playful black and pink bead loops spelling 'His' and 'Hers', adorable cat charms, and a heart connecting both pieces, this set is a sweet reminder that some hearts are always linked—no matter the distance.

reviews.name: Farah I.
reviews.text: Delicate and dainty, exactly what I wanted.

products.name: Blue Guardian Charm
products.shortDescription: A handcrafted evil eye phone charm featuring deep blue beads, designed to bring a touch of style, positivity, and protection wherever you go.
products.description: Carry a symbol of protection with you every day. The Blue Guardian Charm is handcrafted with classic evil eye beads and shimmering crystal accents, inspired by the timeless belief in warding off negative energy and attracting good fortune. Its minimalist design makes it the perfect accessory for your phone, bag, keys, or wallet.Whether you're gifting it to someone special or keeping it for yourself, this charm is a stylish reminder to carry positive energy wherever life takes you.

reviews.name: Divya N.
reviews.text: Cutest little thing, gets compliments every time I take a call.

reviews.name: Rhea M.
reviews.text: Good quality for the price, just wish the loop was slightly bigger.

categories.name: Keychain Charms
categories.tagline: Give your keys some personality with a charm of their own.

products.name: Daisy Chain Keychain
products.shortDescription: Hand-strung daisies on a sturdy keyring.
products.description: A row of little clay daisies strung by hand onto a strong split ring, sized to hold a full set of keys without sagging.

reviews.name: Kavya T.
reviews.text: Really sturdy, wasn't expecting that at this size.

products.name: Initial Charm Keychain
products.description: One hand-painted wooden initial on a beaded keyring — tell us the letter when you order. A simple, personal everyday piece.

reviews.name: Sanya B.
reviews.text: Ordered the letter S, painting was so neat and precise.

categories.name: Custom & Personalised
categories.tagline: Initials, colours, or your own idea — made to order.

products.name: Custom Initial Charm
products.shortDescription: Your initial, your colours, made to order.
products.description: Tell us your initial and preferred colour palette, and we'll hand-make a one-of-a-kind charm just for you. Please allow a few extra days for custom orders.

reviews.name: Ira D.
reviews.text: They matched my exact colour reference, so happy with it.

products.name: Birthstone Charm
products.shortDescription: A charm featuring your birthstone colour.
products.description: A dainty charm featuring beads in your birthstone colour, made to order. Let us know your birth month when you message us.

reviews.name: Neha V.
reviews.text: Beautiful colour match for my birthstone, will order again.
